title: Voxel1's Better Nether Forests
body:
**you can use distibute these assets as long as you give credit to me and the origninal creators. do not claim it as your own work unless you give credit and modify it in some way.**




his pack, in my opinion, improves the nether forests and makes them more immersive. 

it uses assets from the 'More Nether Roots' pack and 'Grass+' pack and I really hope this counts as giving credit. 

_(use optifine or any other mod that allows for emissive textures for the best results)_

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/9M9NqzcPOQU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
